fields.name: ENABLE
fields.description: Gates normal controller operation and scratchpad access.

fields.name: SOFT_RESET
fields.description: Requests controller-visible state to be cleared. Does not erase SRAM contents.

fields.name: IRQ_ENABLE
fields.description: Enables irq assertion when latched BIST status events are present.

fields.name: ready
fields.description: Asserted when controller is enabled and not busy.

fields.name: busy
fields.description: Indicates controller is processing a memory access or BIST-related activity.

fields.name: WDATA
fields.description: 32-bit write data captured for SRAM write operations.

fields.name: RDATA
fields.description: Most recently captured SRAM read data word.

fields.name: MEM_WRITE
fields.description: Write one to request a single SRAM write using MEM_ADDR and MEM_WDATA. Self-clearing or sampled as a one-cycle request.

fields.name: MEM_READ
fields.description: Write one to request a single SRAM read using MEM_ADDR. Self-clearing or sampled as a one-cycle request.

registers.name: BIST_CONTROL
registers.description: BIST request and result-clear control register.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Starts BIST when written or when the external bist_start input is asserted.

fields.name: CLEAR_RESULT
fields.description: Clears latched BIST results and IRQ_STATUS bits.

fields.name: last_fail_addr
fields.description: Last failing SRAM address, 8 bits wide.

fields.name: bist_done
fields.description: Latched interrupt source for BIST done.

fields.name: bist_fail
fields.description: Latched interrupt source for BIST fail.

sources.name: bist_done
sources.description: Asserted when BIST completion is latched and IRQ_ENABLE is set.

sources.name: bist_fail
sources.description: Asserted when BIST failure is latched and IRQ_ENABLE is set.

interrupts.irq_behavior: irq asserts when CONTROL.IRQ_ENABLE is set and at least one of IRQ_STATUS.bist_done or IRQ_STATUS.bist_fail is latched. irq deasserts when IRQ_ENABLE is clear or after the corresponding IRQ_STATUS bits are cleared.

init_sequence: Deassert reset and wait for STATUS.ready to become 1 after writing CONTROL.ENABLE=1.
Optionally program MEM_ADDR and MEM_WDATA to prepare scratchpad access.
Use MEM_CONTROL.MEM_WRITE=1 for a single write or MEM_CONTROL.MEM_READ=1 for a single read.
If using BIST, set CONTROL.IRQ_ENABLE=1 before starting BIST.
polling_sequence: Poll STATUS.busy to determine when a request has completed if firmware uses the memory access path or BIST activity is in progress.
Read MEM_RDATA after a MEM_READ request to obtain the most recently captured SRAM word.
Read BIST_STATUS for done/fail/running state and last_fail_addr.
Read IRQ_STATUS to determine which BIST events are latched.
irq_sequence: On irq assertion, read IRQ_STATUS and BIST_STATUS to identify done/fail cause.
Clear latched interrupt sources by writing ones to IRQ_CLEAR or by writing BIST_CONTROL.CLEAR_RESULT=1.
If needed, re-arm future interrupts by keeping CONTROL.IRQ_ENABLE set while clearing the latched status bits.

consistency_notes: All assumptions remain compatible with DIGITAL_SPEC_JSON.
The register map uses 32-bit word-addressed MMIO offsets to match the specified top-level controller interface.
No new hierarchy, ports, or bus protocol beyond the spec is introduced.
